About K4 Games

We create engaging Roblox experiences that bring players together.

Our Mission

K4 Games is a Roblox development studio focused on building fun, competitive, and creative games. From our breakout hit Laser Gun Spleef with over 4 million visits to our innovative bridge and strategy games, we're dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what Roblox games can be.

With over 5 million total visits and a growing portfolio of 20+ games, we continue to experiment with new genres, mechanics, and ideas to deliver fresh experiences to the Roblox community.

What We Build

Our games span multiple genres and play styles

🎯

Competitive Spleef

Laser gun spleef games where you destroy blocks beneath opponents to be the last one standing.

🌈

Bridge Challenges

Color bridge and glass bridge games that test your IQ, reflexes, and luck.

🧠

Strategy & Prediction

1v1 games built around bluffing, timing, and outsmarting your opponent.

🎭

Social & Comedy

Unique social experiences from stage fright performances to troll bridges.

Our Studios

We develop across multiple Roblox groups

K4 Quick Games

Our flagship studio behind Laser Gun Spleef — fast-paced, competitive games designed for quick sessions.

Kaforr Games

Home to our bridge and troll games, brainrot experiences, and creative social experiments.

K4 Blocked Games

Focused on 1v1 strategy and prediction games — Block or Get Shot, Predict the Shot, and Reload Duel.

K4 Games

Our core group and the foundation of the K4 Games brand.

Stage Fright.

Social storytelling games where you perform in front of a crowd and see how they react.
K4 Games

Building engaging Roblox experiences with millions of players worldwide.
